assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: The data-extraction.md Step 0 section states: 'The Source Repositories table includes a **Deployment Context** column. The repository `rhtpa-backend` has deployment context **customer-shipped**. This value is recorded for use in Step 8 remediation task descriptions (Coordination Guidance subsection).' The Source Repositories table explicitly shows '| rhtpa-backend | ... | customer-shipped |'

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: The data-extraction.md Step 1 Deployment Context Lookup section states: 'The component label `pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server` maps to the source repository **rhtpa-backend**. Looking up the deployment context from the Source Repositories table: Repository: rhtpa-backend, Deployment Context: **customer-shipped**. This deployment context is recorded as part of the CVE metadata and will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate Coordination Guidance in remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence:
The remediation.md upstream backport task description includes under Implementation Notes: '### Coordination Guidance

This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate fix with Product
Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.' The downstream propagation task also includes the same Coordination Guidance subsection.

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: The Coordination Guidance text in both remediation tasks states: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate fix with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.'
